headline: Congress honors Senator Lindsey Graham with a day of solemn remembrance while eyeing defense bills and judicial confirmations ahead.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate confirmed Arthur Roberts Jones as United States District Judge for the Southern District of Texas by a 46-44 vote. Members passed S. Res. 801 honoring the late Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina. The chamber adjourned early at 7:12 p.m. out of respect for his memory.

onTheFloor.title: Confirmation vote for U.S. Circuit Judge for the Second Circuit
onTheFloor.status: Cloture vote scheduled for Tuesday at 12 noon

onTheFloor.title: National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027
onTheFloor.status: Cloture motion expected Tuesday at 2:40 p.m.

onTheFloor.title: U.S. District Judge for the Southern District of Florida
onTheFloor.status: Cloture vote pending on S. 4784 disposition

onTheFloor.title: National programmable cloud laboratories network for research

house.lastSessionSummary: The House passed 12 measures under suspension of the rules, including aviation security funding, military travel improvements, and fentanyl trafficking metrics bills. Members adopted H. Res. 1424 expressing sorrow at the death of Senator Lindsey Graham. The chamber adjourned at 7:14 p.m. in his honor.

onTheFloor.title: Sunshine Protection Act of 2025 - make daylight savings time permanent
National Security and State Department Appropriations Act for fiscal year 2027
Take Care of America's Veterans Act - improve veteran benefits and VA administration
Protecting Privacy in Purchases Act - prevent payment card networks from requiring firearms retailer codes
Weatherizing Infrastructure in the North and Terrorism Emergency Readiness Act
Improving Travel for American Families Act
Aviation Security Funding Act - establish funds for aviation security investments
onTheFloor.status: Passed under suspension of the rules Monday

Subcommittee hearing on PACT Act implementation and VA disability claims modernization through technology
